title: lysimachia fukienensis
intro: Lysimachia fukienensis, also known as Fukien tea or Chinese voodoo lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Lysimachia, which includes around 160 species of flowering plants. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, making it a potential treatment for cardiovascular diseases. The health benefits of Lysimachia fukienensis include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and acting as an antioxidant. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, or as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
